zh.lifeSummary: 當Margeret Abrahall於1402年出生在英國賀福爾福易時，她的父親John Richard Abrahall32歲，母親Elizabeth Pechere26歲。她於大約1420年與Robert ap Eynon Baynham在英國英格蘭賀福爾福易結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1455年10月7日在英國史洛普爾享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margeret Abrahall于1402年出生在英国賀福爾福易时，她的父亲John Richard Abrahall32岁，母亲Elizabeth Pechere26岁。她于大约1420年与Robert ap Eynon Baynham在英国英格兰賀福爾福易结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1455年10月7日在英国史洛普爾享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Abrahall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Aberhall in Hentland (Herefs), which is recorded as Aberhale in 1334. The place-name may mean ‘Eadburh's nook’, from the Old English female personal name Ēadburh (genitive Ēadburge) + halh ‘nook, corner’, though the first element is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: Margeret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margeret Abrahall was born in 1402, in Foy, Herefordshire, England, her father, John Richard Abrahall, was 32 and her mother, Elizabeth Pechere, was 26. She married Robert ap Eynon Baynham about 1420, in Foy, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 7 October 1455, in Shropshire, England, at the age of 53.

Elle a épousé Robert ap Eynon Baynham environ 1420, à Foy, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 7 octobre 1455, à Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Margeret Abrahallが1402年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアフォイで生まれた時，父John Richard Abrahallは32歳，母Elizabeth Pechereは26歳であった。約1420年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアフォイでRobert ap Eynon Baynhamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1455年10月7日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margeret Abrahall(이)가 1402년 영국 허퍼드실르 포이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Richard Abrahall(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Pechere(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1420년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 포이에서 Robert ap Eynon Baynham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1455년 10월 7일 영국 슈럽실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Robert ap Eynon Baynham aproximadamente 1420, em Foy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margeret Abrahall родилась в 1402 г. в местности фои, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Richard Abrahall было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Pechere, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert ap Eynon Baynham около 1420 г. в местности фои, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 7 октября 1455 г. в местности шропшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

Se casó con Robert ap Eynon Baynham aproximadamente 1420, en Foy, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija.
